spell.eyelisspartmod.spear_thrust.name: Spear Thrust
spell.eyelisspartmod.spear_thrust.descri: Lunge forward, striking all enemies along your path, dealing your weapon's damage.
spell.eyelisspartmod.swarm_of_knives.des: Throws twelve of your blades one after another, dealing {damage} damage each, and homing if directly looking at a target when casting.
spell.eyelisspartmod.swing_spam.descript: Swing your weapon in front of you four times, dealing half damage each swing.
spell.eyelisspartmod.swing_spam.name: Swing Spam
spell.eyelisspartmod.disarm.description: Do a spin attack that disables shields, or applies weakness if not blocked.
spell.eyelisspartmod.disarm.name: Disarming Strike
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.piercing.desc: Allows you to pierce through enemy armor, at the cost of swing speed
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.thousand_cuts: A 15(+5 per level) percent chance to apply Bleeding Out to the enemy for 2 seconds
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.styx_curse.de: A 10(+2.5 per level) percent chance to apply Styx Poison to the enemy for 4 seconds
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.jabber.desc: Reduces cast duration. Reduces cooldown by half. Reduces damage by half
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.ethereal_reac: Gives increased attack range, at the cost of lowering attack speed
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.pointed.desc: Increases attack damage of spears by a flat amount, more than sharpness
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.hooking.desc: Gives a 25% chance to apply weakness on hits
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.chemical_infu: Allows you to put up to 3 potions in the Arm
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.chemical_burs: Halves the duration of potions in the arm, but increases their level by 1
enchantment.eyelisspartmod.ranged_delive: Allows you to charge up the Arm and throw it, with a 12s cooldown
tooltip.eyelisspartmod.advanced_weapon_s: A station used to craft unique, high material cost items
Can have unique limited craft items in it's list
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.styx: Splash Potion of Styx Poison IV
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.s: Lingering Potion of Styx Poison IV
death.attack.styx_poison.player: %1$s returned to the Styx while trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.bleeding_out.player: %1$s bled out while trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.source_sauce: %1$s was completely returned to the Source
death.attack.source_sauce.player: %1$s returned to the source while trying to escape %2$s
gui.eyelisspartmod.survival_guide_conten: §5§lEngravings{r}§rTo obtain an engraving, you must use a specific Shriving Stone on the item you wish to engrave.{r} {r}To charge up the magical engraving bar, you must kill mobs, you get more charge from higher health mobs.{r} {r}To charge up the geologic engraving bar, you must mine blocks.{r} {r}Every tier of engraving takes 10x more to gain another.{r} {r}§5§lCurses{r}§rTo remove curses, you must use a Blessed Shriving Stone on the item{r}This will replace the cursed engraving with a Baptised engraving.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.abs: Heals for 12.5% of damage dealt{r} And increasing by 7.5% per level past 1.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.cru: Cancels 15% of armor values{r} And increasing by 10% per level past 1.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.for: Provides a flat damage reduction of 2.5%{r}And increasing by 1.25% per level after the first.{r}Multiple pieces stack as if you had a higher level.{r} {r}Ex. Helmet with fortitude 3, and boots with fortitude 3 will read as fortitude 6, or 8.75% damage reduction.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.lig: Increases movement by +5%{r} And increasing by 2.5% per level after the first.{r}Multiple pieces stack as if you had a higher level.{r} {r}Ex. boots with lightweight 3 and leggings with lightweight 3 will increase speed by 17.5
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.stu: Grants increasing effective durability.{r} {r}I = 20% less durability loss{r} {r}II = +33% durability{r} {r}III = Immunity to environmental damage effects.{r}Includes the void, teleporting the item to the nearest safe block.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.sta: Locks the possibility of gaining more engravings.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.rui: A curse that makes items incapable of restoration via mending.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.res: Gives +1 level of mending passively.{r} {r}Allows mending to reach level II.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.tra: Gives +2 engraving slots.{r}Divides future engraving costs by 100.{r}Doesn't take an engraving slot.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.wis: Boosts all player collected experience by +20% per piece with this on it.{r} {r}Adds a 20% chance to gain 15 shriving progression for every 50 experience points picked up.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.bap: What remains of a cleansed curse engraving.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.pul: Pickaxes/Shovels break in a 3x3 area.{r} {r}Axes mine logs and leaves that are connected.{r} {r}Hoes break all matured crops near them, as well as all leaves that are connected.{r} {r}Hold the Pulverizing key to use.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.eth: Grants +2 Block Interaction Range{r} {r}Increases mining speed against blocks that require a different tool.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.dwa: Increases tool efficiency by up to +33% as you descend deeper underground.{r} {r}Grants a permanent +1 bonus level to Fortune mining drops.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.sha: Breaks blocks that don't have a valid tool as if the held tool is the correct type.{r} {r}Forces the block to drop as if you have Silk Touch if it has no valid tool types.{r}Hold Shift to bypass and destroy blocks normally.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.ble: After recieving enough experience, this turns into a random blessing.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.exo: Deal 10% less damage to non undead per level.{r} {r}Deal 50% more damage to undead per level.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.mag: Take 10% of your physical damage and convert it to magical damage per level.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.has: Add 50% more spell haste, and for every additional piece you gain 12.5% instead.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.tru: Deal +1 true damage on hit every level.{r} {r}Deals +1 extra true damage at level 3.
engraving.description.eyelisspartmod.swe: Allows the currently held weapon to sweep like a sword.{r} {r}If the item is a sword, it instead increases sweeping size.
